name: Frosty Pumpkin Ice Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, working quickly, combine ice cream, pumpkin, sugar, and pumpkin pie spice; stir gently but thoroughly to blend.
2. Spread the ice cream mixture evenly in the prepared crust.
3. Freeze until firm, at least 1 hour or overnight.
4. To serve: Swirl whipped cream decoratively around the edge of the pie.
5. Top with walnut-shaped chocolate candies, if desired.
6. Makes 10 servings.
